posts.author: sarasciar (Sara Sciartilli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everybody,

a potential client asked me if it is possible, through an integration or app, to send a PDF document to a general email address (and I think this is doable through the Emails&Activities App) and based on the data in the document to create a workflow/project/task on the platform.

Hope somebody can help me figuring it out!

Thank in you in advance.

Cheers.
